## Summary

- What backend change does this PR make?
- Which app flows are affected?

## Change Type

- [ ] SQL migration
- [ ] Edge Function
- [ ] Local tooling / CI / docs
- [ ] Production-only operational change

## Validation

- [ ] `supabase db reset` passes locally
- [ ] Affected app flows were tested against local Supabase
- [ ] Edge Functions were linted / type-checked if changed
- [ ] Production-impacting changes were reviewed carefully

## Production Notes

- [ ] No production secret changes required
- [ ] Production secret changes required and documented
- [ ] Manual rollout/rollback notes added if risk is non-trivial

## Risks

- What could break if this is merged?
- What is the safest rollback or forward-fix path?
